narration: Here's what science actually says about mRNA vs DNA viruses.
visual_description: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about mRNA vs DNA viruses.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about mRNA vs DNA viruses.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about mRNA vs DNA viruses.

narration: mRNA viruses, like COVID-19, use messenger RNA to hijack our cells, while DNA viruses, such as herpes, utilize DNA.
visual_description: Context visual: mRNA viruses, like COVID-19, use messenger RNA to hijack our cells, while DNA viruses, such as herpes, utilize DNA.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: mRNA viruses, like COVID-19, use messenger RNA to hijack our cells, while DNA viruses, such as herpes, utilize DNA.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: mRNA viruses, like COVID-19, use messenger RNA to hijack our cells, while DNA viruses, such as herpes, utilize DNA.

narration: This difference means mRNA viruses can mutate rapidly, making them elusive targets for our immune system!
visual_description: Escalation visual: This difference means mRNA viruses can mutate rapidly, making them elusive targets for our immune system!
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: This difference means mRNA viruses can mutate rapidly, making them elusive targets for our immune system!
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: This difference means mRNA viruses can mutate rapidly, making them elusive targets for our immune system!

narration: Studies show that mRNA vaccines effectively train our immune response against these tricky invaders.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Studies show that mRNA vaccines effectively train our immune response against these tricky invaders.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Studies show that mRNA vaccines effectively train our immune response against these tricky invaders.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Studies show that mRNA vaccines effectively train our immune response against these tricky invaders.

narration: So, while DNA viruses are more stable, mRNA viruses keep us on our toes.
visual_description: Payoff visual: So, while DNA viruses are more stable, mRNA viruses keep us on our toes.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: So, while DNA viruses are more stable, mRNA viruses keep us on our toes.
